zh.lifeSummary: John Huchins於大約1550年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾。他於大約1570年與Unknown在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1613年9月18日在英國奧可福爾金哈姆享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Huchins于大约1550年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾。他于大约1570年与Unknown在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1613年9月18日在英国奧可福爾金哈姆享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Huchins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: John Huchins was born about 1550, in Gloucestershire, England. He married Unknown about 1570, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 September 1613, in Kingham, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: John Huchins est né environ 1550, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Unknown environ 1570, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1613, à Kingham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Huchins wurde um 1550 in Gloucestershire, England geboren. Er hat um 1570 in Oxfordshire, England Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. September 1613 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Kingham, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: John Huchins è nato il circa 1550 nel Gloucestershire, England. Lui sposato Unknown circa 1570, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1613, nel Kingham, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Huchinsは約1550年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた。約1570年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでUnknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1613年9月18日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアキンガムで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Huchins(은)는 대략 1550년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1570년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1613년 9월 18일 영국 스퍼드실르 킨그함에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Huchins nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Unknown aproximadamente 1570, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1613, em Kingham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Huchins родился около 1550 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown около 1570 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 сентября 1613 г. в местности кингхам, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Huchins nació aproximadamente 1550, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Unknown aproximadamente 1570, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1613, en Kingham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
